description: Database connection string with possible credentials in AI system code. Article 15 requires cybersecurity measures for high-risk systems. Fix: Use environment variable for connection strings. Never hardcode credentials.
deadline_note: Article 15 cybersecurity requirements. Current law: 2 Aug 2026.
